title: Live CdpChannel READ path + backend-api capture + scrape capability (READ-ONLY, attended)
directive: Implement the live CdpChannel READ path + backend-api capture + scrape per M3 design (sections 2.9, 4, and 10 M5 steps 1-4 & 6; SKIP step 5 send-smoke, deferred). Real-verify scrape over CDP against the operator's signed-in Chromium on the operator-approved smoke conversation only. ZERO real sends or new turns this phase.

constraints.branch_only: rewrite-v2; NEVER move/commit/merge/checkout stable (must stay 779eb40); NEVER uv tool install/upgrade/reinstall; uv run / uv sync only; NEVER git push; stage ONLY src/ask_chatgpt + tests + team files, NEVER git add -A; never stage issues/cdp-send-repro/controller.mjs (another agent edits it); do not edit team/state/live-state.json (team-lead's).
constraints.safety_real_leg: Browser at http://127.0.0.1:9222 is SHARED with another active agent (keep-pushing loop on /c/6a316aa8). OWN-TAB-ONLY: each real leg creates its own page (context.new_page), records it, operates ONLY on it; NEVER iterate/read context.pages; never read/navigate/click/screenshot any tab it did not open. READ-ONLY: NO sends, NO new turns, NO message submission, NO model/tool selection. Read ONLY smoke 6a3483b3-9850-83ea-a9f7-3e269932e387 and (read-only, scale/fidelity only) target 6a316aa8-5dc8-83ea-9014-b8ea38dabc31. NEVER quit/close the browser (detach only; may close own tabs). Preflight curl -s --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/version before any real leg; fail -> CDP_UNREACHABLE STOP. No stealth. Allowlist domains only. Login/Cloudflare -> STOP HUMAN-ACTION-NEEDED, read-only poll only. NEVER persist or log Authorization/oai-*/cookie header values; redact in all artifacts; no bulk conversation content in committed files.
constraints.dispatch: Opus manager. Source-mutating implementation = SINGLE pi editor. Real-leg CDP workers = pi with full safety block transcribed verbatim. Independent pi verification panel (incl. no-leak + no-send + header-redaction audit). NEVER the Claude Agent tool. TDD where offline-testable; real legs attended.

ground_truth.baseline_pytest: 188 passed in ~0.46s (re-derived by manager at M5 start).
ground_truth.playwright: 1.60.0 in project venv; playwright.sync_api.connect_over_cdp callable; attaches to existing Chromium (no browser download needed).
ground_truth.entrypoint: ask-chatgpt = ask_chatgpt.cli:main; run rewrite-v2 code via `uv run ask-chatgpt ...` or `uv run python -m ...` (NEVER the installed stable tool, NEVER uv tool).
ground_truth.integration_seam: session._channel():209 raises NotImplementedError for cdp -> add lazy CdpChannel branch. scrape() -> tab_pool.acquire(open own tab+navigate, SPA fires own /backend-api/conversation/<id> request) -> capture_conversation -> acquire_backend_headers(channel.wait_for_request observes own request) -> stream_backend_conversation(channel.fetch_in_page stream_to=raw_tmp) -> validate_backend_shape -> iter_current_branch_records -> store.write_raw_mapping_atomic + upsert_many. CdpChannel must implement BrowserChannel Protocol (channels/base.py); MockChannel (channels/mock.py) is the reference shape.
ground_truth.m2_facts: backend GET /backend-api/conversation/<id> returns 200 ~17.1MB/~5k nodes ONLY with web-app headers (authorization + oai-client-build-number + oai-client-version + oai-device-id + oai-language + oai-session-id + x-openai-target-path + x-openai-target-route); cookies/accept-only -> 404. Visible markdown in message.content.content_type=='text' parts[]. Math tokens present: \widehat, \frac, \ne/\neq, \(, \[, table pipes; $ delimiter false. async_status top-level; metadata async_source/is_complete/is_finalizing/pro_progress.

queue.title: Design panel (N=3, OFFLINE, non-editing): header-harvest + 17MB streaming + offline-test strategy for CdpChannel
Single pi editor (TDD, OFFLINE): implement CdpChannel read-path + lazy import + wire session cdp branch + scrape
queue.manager_verified: 205 passed (re-derived); no-playwright-import invariant holds (manager-derived); cdp.py: lone playwright import inside _start_playwright, no context.pages, no launch/new_context, action methods raise HumanActionNeededError (behavior-verified); detach=close own tabs+browser.close()(disconnect)+playwright.stop(); leak scan clean; session/capture diffs match design.

queue.title: Real-leg pi worker (ATTENDED CDP, READ-ONLY): production scrape on smoke 6a3483b3; measure RSS/tracemalloc; catalogue completion vocab; fidelity booleans; read-only target scale measure
Verification panel (N=3, OFFLINE, over T3 artifacts + git): safety/leak audit + offline falsifiability + acceptance-conformance

artifacts_trust.note: CDP lifecycle/own-tab/header-exposure design; leak-scanned clean; manager-read.
17MB streaming (expose_binding base64 pump) + measurement thresholds; leak-scanned clean; manager-read.
offline testability + Protocol conformance + completion-vocab reader; leak-scanned clean; manager-read.

design_synthesis.module: src/ask_chatgpt/channels/cdp.py — ONLY Playwright adapter; NO top-level playwright import (lazy inside attach path).
design_synthesis.preflight: urllib GET <endpoint>/json/version (injectable http_get_json); map ok/HTTP-err/timeout/refused/invalid-json/missing-ws -> PreflightResult; websocket value -> bool only.
design_synthesis.attach: lazy sync_playwright().start(); connect_over_cdp(endpoint); context=browser.contexts[0] (fail closed if zero; NEVER enumerate context.pages); never launch.
design_synthesis.open_tab: allowlist FIRST; context.new_page(); private tab_id->page; register page.on('request'/'requestfinished') + same-page CDP session (Network.requestWillBeSent/ExtraInfo) BEFORE goto(wait_until=domcontentloaded). page-scoped only, never context.on.
design_synthesis.wait_for_request: passive; cheap predicate on (url,method) first; on match call request.all_headers(), project ONLY REQUIRED_CAPTURE_HEADERS, delete raw, redacted-repr mapping; CDP ExtraInfo fallback by requestId if names missing; no reload.
design_synthesis.fetch_in_page_stream: expose_binding base64 chunk pump (128KiB), in-page fetch(credentials:include,no-store).body.getReader(); write BYTES (decode at parse only); AbortController for timeout; returns FetchResult(status,safe_resp_headers,body_path=raw_tmp,body_bytes=None). Pure consume_stream_event/append helper offline-tested.
design_synthesis.detach: close own pages; browser.close() (connect_over_cdp => DISCONNECT ONLY, does NOT quit Chromium — documented; T3 must confirm via /json/version after); playwright.stop(); NEVER context.pages.
design_synthesis.evaluate: monotonic NOT needed (CdpChannel omits monotonic attr => capture uses time.monotonic). evaluate dispatches sentinel keys: 'ask_chatgpt_capture_katex_annotations'->real KaTeX JS (list[str]); 'ask_chatgpt_capture_dom_text'->real DOM-text JS (str); else page.evaluate(js,arg).
design_synthesis.actions_deferred: fill/insert_text/click/hover/press/upload_files raise deferred error (M5 read-only, zero sends); read_clipboard raises HumanActionNeededError(clipboard_permission).
design_synthesis.wiring: session._channel() add cdp branch (lazy import CdpChannel); keep mock branch; status() preflight uses real CdpChannel.preflight.
design_synthesis.vocab: catalogue_completion_status_vocab(raw_path): top-level async_status + walk mapping for node/message status,is_complete,is_finalizing,pro_progress -> redacted enum/type/count summary.
design_synthesis.measurement_thresholds: T3 real leg: tracemalloc peak + ru_maxrss, fresh process, smoke then 17MB target. fetch-only <=128MiB RSS/32MiB tracemalloc over baseline; end-to-end fetch+parse+store <=512MiB RSS/256MiB tracemalloc on 17MB -> keep whole-parse(json.load) else event parser.

notes: Multi-session-sized mission. Checkpoint + commit + PARTIAL handoff if budget runs low. Fidelity check folded into T3 (operates on already-fetched data in-process; reports booleans only, no content committed). M5 step 5 send-smoke DEFERRED.
